page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8y.16xlarge is a general-purpose instance powered by the custom ARM-based Alibaba YiTian710 processor. It features 64 dedicated physical cores running at 2.75 GHz with a single thread per core, ensuring dedicated CPU allocation without hyperthreading. The hardware configuration includes 256.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It operates on a KVM hypervisor and does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying instead on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps.

Benchmark results indicate strong multi-core performance and memory efficiency. The instance achieved a strong multi-core stress-ng CPU score of 114,913.22 and a top-tier PassMark memory score of 3,005.05. Memory bandwidth for cached small-block reads is highly efficient at 6,463.67 GB/sec, though uncached large-block read and write speeds remain average at 105.79 GB/sec and 50.98 GB/sec respectively. Multi-threaded decompression tasks perform strongly, as evidenced by a bzip3 throughput of 461.74 GB/sec.

Due to its ARM64 architecture and dedicated physical cores, the ecs.g8y.16xlarge offers high resource density and qualitative cost efficiency for highly parallelized workloads. It is well-suited for database operations, as demonstrated by a strong PassMark database score of 24,564.67 and 93.0 million operations per second in Redis SET benchmarks. Other appropriate workloads include multi-threaded data processing, static web serving, and lightweight LLM inference tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8y.16xlarge is a general-purpose instance powered by the ARM64-based Alibaba YiTian710 processor, featuring 64 dedicated physical cores running at 2.75 GHz and 256.0 GB of RAM. Operating on a KVM hypervisor, this server lacks local storage and GPU acceleration but delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. Benchmarks show strong multi-core capabilities, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 114,913.22 and a top-tier PassMark memory score of 3,005.05. It also demonstrates strong database performance, executing 93.0 million Redis SET operations per second and scoring 24,564.67 in PassMark database operations. The custom ARM architecture provides high resource density, making this instance a qualitatively cost-efficient choice for multi-threaded workloads, database hosting, static web serving, and parallel data processing.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8y.16xlarge is an ARM64 general-purpose server with 64 dedicated YiTian710 cores, 256 GB RAM, and 32 Gbps bandwidth, delivering strong multi-core and database performance.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8y.16xlarge is an ARM64 general-purpose server featuring 64 dedicated YiTian710 cores, 256 GB RAM, and 32 Gbps network bandwidth.
tagline: A dedicated 64-core ARM64 platform delivering balanced memory capacity and strong multi-threaded performance for database and web-serving workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by a 64-core Alibaba YiTian710 ARM64 processor running at 2.75 GHz.
Equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB per core.
Delivers 32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth without local storage or GPUs.
Strong multi-core performance with 114,913.22 stress-ng score.
Excellent database efficiency, achieving 93.0 million Redis SET operations per second.
Optimized for parallel data processing, web serving, and database workloads.
